## Description
Briefly describe what this PR does.

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Testing
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
